families.label: Club Orange
families.description: Club Orange membership and community referral program.

offers.label: Club Orange signup referral
offers.offerSummary: Join Club Orange through a referral-aware signup link.
offers.termsSummary: See the current Club Orange signup page for the latest referral terms and eligibility details.

offers.label: Lemonade referral link
offers.ownerBenefit: Referrer may receive a $10 gift card for each qualified signup.
offers.offerSummary: Use this Lemonade referral link to start a Lemonade signup.
offers.termsSummary: Available to eligible individuals outside LA, MI, MS, WA, and WV. Rewards are limited to 10 qualified referrals over 12 months. See Lemonade for current terms and eligibility details.

matchers.label: Hosted signup path code
matchers.explanation: Club Orange hosted signup links encode the referral token in the /co/<code> path.

matchers.label: Canonical signup referral query
matchers.explanation: The canonical Club Orange signup page uses the referral query parameter to carry the token.

matchers.label: Referral short-link path
matchers.explanation: Lemonade share links encode the referral handle in the /r/<handle> path.

matchers.label: Onboarding referral query
matchers.explanation: Canonical Lemonade onboarding referral links carry the referral context in referral-program query parameters.
